business.name: State Inspection Auto Repair
business.hours: Mon-Fri: 7:30 AM – 5:30 PM, Sat: 8 AM – 12 PM

seo.title: State Inspection Auto Repair | Trusted Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Family-owned auto repair in Dallas since 1985. Expert diagnostics, brakes, AC, and more. Call (214) 327-4019 for honest service.

hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair You Can Trust in Dallas
hero.subheadline: From brake repairs to engine diagnostics, we keep your car running safely and reliably. Honest pricing, quality parts, and a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty.

featureSections.title: State-of-the-Art Diagnostics for Every Make and Model
featureSections.body: Our technicians use advanced diagnostic equipment to quickly identify issues, saving you time and money. Whether it's a check engine light or unusual noise, we get to the root cause.
featureSections.cardBody: We explain what's wrong, show you the parts, and get your approval before starting repairs. No surprises.

featureSections.title: Complete Brake Repair and Replacement
featureSections.body: Your safety depends on reliable brakes. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid to ensure stopping power you can count on. Most brake jobs completed in under two hours.
bullets: Free brake inspection with any service
featureSections.cardBody: We back our brake work with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty. If you're not satisfied, we make it right.

whyChooseUs.title: Honest, Upfront Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We provide detailed estimates and never start work without your approval. No hidden fees, no upselling.

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced ASE-Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team has decades of combined experience and stays current with the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround Times
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs completed same day. We know your time is valuable, so we work efficiently without cutting corners.

whyChooseUs.title: Convenient Dallas Location
whyChooseUs.description: Located on Ferguson Rd near I-30, we're easy to reach from anywhere in the Dallas metro area.

testimonials.quote: I've been bringing my cars here for years. They're honest, fair, and always get the job done right the first time.
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: Fast, friendly service. They diagnosed my check engine light in minutes and saved me hundreds compared to the dealer.
testimonials.author: Jessica T.

testimonials.quote: Best auto shop in Dallas. They stand by their work and treat you like family. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: David L.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Back on the Road?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online to book your appointment. We'll take care of the rest.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services for all makes and models. Every service comes with our commitment to quality, transparency, and a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert repairs for any engine issue.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic tools pinpoint problems fast. From check engine lights to performance issues, we provide thorough analysis and lasting repairs using quality parts.

process.title: Vehicle Assessment
process.description: We connect diagnostic equipment and review trouble codes.

process.title: Inspection & Explanation
process.description: We inspect the affected systems and explain findings in plain English.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: After approval, we perform repairs and test-drive to confirm the fix.

faqs.question: How much does a diagnostic cost?
faqs.answer: Our standard diagnostic fee is $89.95, which is waived if you choose to have us perform the repair.

faqs.question: How long does a diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within 1-2 hours. We'll call you with results and an estimate.

services.title: Brake Repair & Service
services.shortDescription: Complete brake services for safety and performance.
services.longDescription: We inspect, repair, and replace all brake components including pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid. Our brake services restore stopping power and extend the life of your system.
benefits: Free brake inspection with any service

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and check fluid levels.

process.title: Estimate & Approval
process.description: We provide a detailed estimate with options for parts and pricing.

process.title: Installation & Test
process.description: We install quality parts, bleed the system, and test brakes on the road.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brakes?
faqs.answer: Most pads last 30,000-70,000 miles. We recommend an inspection every 15,000 miles.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on brake work?
faqs.answer: Yes, all brake repairs come with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty. Select parts have a lifetime warranty.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.longDescription: From air conditioning recharge to heater core replacement, we handle all HVAC issues. We use OEM-spec refrigerants and components to ensure optimal performance.

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor function, and airflow.

process.title: Diagnostic Report
process.description: We identify the root cause and provide a clear estimate.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We repair or replace components and recharge the system to spec.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or an electrical issue. We can diagnose and fix it.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC performance check every two years to ensure efficiency and catch small issues early.

services.title: Oil Changes & Preventive Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Routine maintenance to extend the life of your vehicle.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes and preventive maintenance are the best way to protect your engine and avoid costly repairs. We use quality oils and filters for all makes and models.
benefits: Fluid top-offs and tire pressure check

process.title: Oil Drain & Filter Change
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and refill with fresh oil.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, fluids, tires, and lights.

process.title: Report & Recommendations
process.description: We provide a vehicle health report and suggest any needed services.

faqs.question: How often should I change my oil?
faqs.answer: Most modern vehicles need an oil change every 5,000-7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual for specifics.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic oils to match your vehicle's requirements.

about.headline: Serving Dallas with Honest Auto Repair Since 1985
about.mission: Our mission is to provide reliable, transparent auto repair services that keep our community safe on the road. We treat every customer like family and every car like our own.
story: State Inspection Auto Repair was founded in 1985 by John Miller, a master mechanic with a vision to create a shop where quality and honesty came first. Starting in a small two-bay garage on Ferguson Road, John built a reputation for fair pricing and expert workmanship. Over the years, the shop grew as loyal customers returned and referred friends and neighbors.

Today, we carry on that tradition with a team of ASE-certified technicians and state-of-the-art equipment. While the tools have evolved, our core values remain the same: diagnose accurately, fix it right the first time, and charge fairly. We're proud to be a trusted part of the Dallas community for nearly 40 years.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell the truth about what your car needs and what it doesn't. No unnecessary repairs.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use only quality parts and fluids, and every repair is backed by our warranty.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: You get a detailed estimate with photos before any work begins. We want you to feel confident.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve Dallas and support local families, schools, and businesses.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with State Inspection Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: We're here to answer your questions and schedule your appointment. Call, stop by, or fill out the form below.
